TestCase z7Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    if (t1.a != NULL && t1.n1 > 0) {
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    }
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive programming and boundary checks
    if (follow_case.n1 <= 0) {
        // No elements to modify, return directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific transformation: subtract 2.0 from a random element
    // Use rand() modulo n1 to get an index within bounds
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n1;
    follow_case.a[idx] -= 2.0;

    return follow_case;
}
